# SRC056 - OpenAI Evaluation Best Practices

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | Agent Evals |
| Authors / source | OpenAI |
| Year | Current |
| Source type | Official developer docs |
| Quality | High |
| URL | [https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/evaluation-best-practices](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/evaluation-best-practices) |

## Bias / limitation

Official platform guidance.

## Core takeaway

Task-specific evals should use real distributions, logs, automation, and calibrated feedback.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to make campaign run quality inspectable.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

```markdown
### Source extraction

- Source ID: SRC056
- What it changes about our strategy:
- What it proves:
- What it does not prove:
- Ad tactic suggested:
- Landing page proof suggested:
- Measurement implication:
- Follow-up source needed:
```
